.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper version constant from 0.5.5 to 3.1.1 to use a more recent wrapper implementation.
Update the default download URL to point to the new Maven Wrapper artifact group (org.apache.maven.wrapper) corresponding to the new version.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: private static final String DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL = "https://repo.maven.apache.org/maven2/org/apache/maven/wrapper/maven-wrapper/" + WRAPPER_VERSION + "/maven-wrapper-" + WRAPPER_VERSION + ".jar";

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Replace the old-style copyright header with the standard Apache License 2.0 boilerplate text.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: /* Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more contributor license agreements... */

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformat the Java code to adhere to a specific coding style, including brace placement, spacing, and line wrapping.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: public class MavenWrapperDownloader { ... } -> public class MavenWrapperDownloader \n { ... }

src/test/java/org/acme/GreetingResourceT.general_idea: Add JUnit 5 annotation to disable the test on Windows operating systems.
Change the HTTP GET request path from '/hello/world' to '/hello' to match the updated API.
Update the expected response body from 'Hola world' to 'Hello World' to match the new endpoint behavior.

pom.xml.general_idea: Rename the Maven artifact ID to a shorter, cleaner name.
Update the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
Upgrade the Quarkus platform BOM to version 3.19.4 to support Java 21 and modern APIs.
Upgrade the Maven compiler plugin to version 3.14.0 for better Java 21 support.
Upgrade the Maven Surefire plugin to version 3.5.2.
Replace the deprecated RESTEasy Classic dependency with the new Quarkus REST (RESTEasy Reactive) dependencies.
Add explicit Jackson JSON provider dependency for the new REST implementation.
Add SmallRye OpenAPI dependency for API documentation generation.
Add Hibernate ORM with REST Data Panache for simplified data access.
Add Quarkus OpenShift extension for Kubernetes/OpenShift deployment support.
Add SmallRye Health extension for application health monitoring.
Add the formatter-maven-plugin to enforce code formatting standards.
Move the maven-failsafe-plugin configuration from the native profile to the global build section and simplify native profile properties.
Remove the failsafe.useModulePath property which is no longer needed in modern Maven/Java setups.

.gitignore.general_idea: Reorganize .gitignore to group Maven-related ignores at the top and remove redundant or incorrect entries.
.gitignore.human_impl: Moved #Maven block to top, removed '*/target' and '*.iml' from Maven section, added '.flattened-pom.xml'.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .factorypath to .gitignore to exclude Eclipse factory path configuration files.
.gitignore.human_impl: Added '.factorypath' under # Visual Studio Code section.

.gitignore.general_idea: Add .env to .gitignore to prevent committing local environment variables.
.gitignore.human_impl: Added '# Local environment' and '.env' at the end of the file.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper distribution and JAR URLs to newer versions (Maven 3.8.6 and Wrapper 3.1.1) to ensure compatibility with modern build environments.
Add the Apache License 2.0 header to the Maven Wrapper properties file for compliance.
.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.human_impl:
# Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one
# or more contributor license agreements...

mvnw.general_idea: Update the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Correct the script header comment to remove the outdated '2' from 'Maven2'.
mvnw.human_impl: Maven2 Start Up Batch script -> Maven Start Up Batch script

mvnw.general_idea: Add support for loading a system-wide mavenrc configuration file.
Improve Java executable detection to avoid conflicts with shell functions named 'command'.
Upgrade the Maven Wrapper JAR from the deprecated Takari version to the official Apache version.
Ensure partial or failed downloads of the wrapper JAR are removed to prevent corruption.
Remove trailing whitespace from the curl download block.
mvnw.human_impl: Removed trailing spaces after curl command

mvnw.general_idea: Pass MAVEN_DEBUG_OPTS to the JVM to support debugging configurations.
Reformat JVM system properties for better readability and consistency.

mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper JAR version from 0.5.5 to 3.1.1 to align with modern standards.
Change the Maven Wrapper artifact group ID from io.takari to org.apache.maven.wrapper.
Add usebackq to FOR loop to correctly parse properties file with backticks or special characters.
Replace deprecated %HOME% variable with %USERPROFILE% for better Windows compatibility.
Pass command line arguments to pre-execution RC scripts to allow them to modify environment based on input.
Use cmd /C exit to ensure the error code is correctly propagated to the parent shell.
Remove spaces around == in IF statements to prevent parsing issues with empty variables.
Break long Java execution command into multiple lines using caret for better readability.
Update Apache License URL from http to https.
Rename script header from Maven2 to Maven to reflect current naming conventions.
Correct typo 'key stroke' to 'keystroke' in documentation comment.
mvnw.cmd.human_impl: @REM MAVEN_BATCH_PAUSE - set to 'on' to wait for a keystroke before ending

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.general_idea: Switch the Docker base image from UBI8 with OpenJDK 11 to UBI9 with OpenJDK 21 to support the target Java version.
Remove the redundant LANG environment variable as it is likely handled by the new base image or is unnecessary.
Move Quarkus-specific JVM options from JAVA_OPTS to JAVA_OPTS_APPEND to prevent overriding default JVM tuning provided by the new container entrypoint.
Remove the explicit AB_JOLOKIA_OFF environment variable, likely because Jolokia is no longer included or configured by default in the new base image.
Explicitly define the entrypoint to use the JBoss container run script, ensuring proper JVM tuning and startup behavior in the new UBI9 image.
Update comments to reflect new environment variables required for debugging in the new container image.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.human_impl: Added comments about JAVA_DEBUG and JAVA_DEBUG_PORT

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.general_idea: Update comments to clarify the difference between JAVA_OPTS and JAVA_OPTS_APPEND in the new container setup.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.jvm.human_impl: Updated comments regarding JAVA_OPTS overriding defaults

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.general_idea: Switch the Docker base image from UBI8 OpenJDK 11 to UBI9 OpenJDK 21 to align with the target JDK version.
Adopt the standard JBoss container entrypoint script to handle Java runtime configuration and startup.
Move Quarkus-specific JVM options from JAVA_OPTS to JAVA_OPTS_APPEND to prevent overriding default tuning provided by the new entrypoint script.
Remove the AB_JOLOKIA_OFF environment variable as it is no longer required or supported in the new container image context.
Remove the explicit LANG environment variable, relying on the base image defaults or the remaining LANGUAGE variable.
Update the Maven build command in comments to use the new Quarkus property name for legacy jar packaging.
Update documentation comments to reflect the new environment variables required for debugging with the JBoss container entrypoint.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.legacy-jar.human_impl: Added instructions for JAVA_DEBUG=true and JAVA_DEBUG_PORT=*:5005

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native.general_idea: Update the comment to reflect the new Maven flag for native builds.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native.human_impl: Changed comment from `./mvnw package -Pnative` to `./mvnw package -Dnative`

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native.general_idea: Upgrade the Docker base image from UBI 8 to UBI 9 to align with modern OS support.
Add documentation explaining the base image version and how to switch to UBI 8.
src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native.human_impl: Added comments about UBI 9 base and UBI 8 alternative

src/main/docker/Dockerfile.native.general_idea: Set executable permissions on the application binary during the COPY step.
Change the container start instruction from CMD to ENTRYPOINT for better execution semantics.
